mano_cua.result_summary: 三个组件演示均未正常渲染：1) AnimatedCircularProgressBar 预览区域完全空白，未渲染环形进度条；2) WorldMap 预览区域同样空白，世界地图未渲染；3) ParticleImage 预览区域为空，仅显示一条极细边框线，无粒子图片效果。三个组件的 Preview 标签页内容容器均为空。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Particle Image page confirms the bug. The preview area between the Preview tab button section and the API section is completely empty - there is only a very thin, almost invisible line/border, indicating an empty preview container with no content rendered inside it.
